title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group
jsonLd.description:
Lodha Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
